## 🚀 READY TO LAUNCH

### Prerequisites
- ✅ Node.js v18+
- ✅ npm package manager
- ✅ Firebase account (free tier)
- ✅ GitHub account (for deployment)

### What's Needed from You

1. **Firebase Project Setup** (20 minutes)
   - Create Firebase project
   - Enable services
   - Get credentials
   - Update .env.local

2. **Local Testing** (15 minutes)
   - Run `npm install`
   - Run `npm run dev`
   - Test all features

3. **Deployment** (5-10 minutes)
   - Push to GitHub
   - Deploy to Vercel/Railway/etc
   - Verify production site

4. **Go Live** (Done! 🎉)
   - Everything works
   - Share with team
   - Start adding content
